data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. COBY KADE turned spotting a big start finishing sixth (30.54) last time in a Grade 5 at this track. Has claims if she runs up to expectations. 1. SNOOPY'S ETHICS has been a little hard to follow, finishing out of the placings latest but was in winning form two back scoring in a Grade 5 at Bulli. Rates a winning chance on best. 2. SELL YOUR SOUL produced a moderate run last time when fifth at Richmond over 401m behind Zipping Marquez (23.35) in a Grade 4/5. Was in the money prior to that. The form from his last run stacks up well. Can do much better this time. 4. HAPPY ETHICS finished in the placings last start and deserves some thought.","runners":[6,1,2,4],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"1. SPIN AROUND BLUE showed blistering pace early and gave a sight when in the minors, beaten 3.5 lengths over 525m Taree Super Track in 30.53. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last start. Winning claims. 8. COUSIN SAL is progressing well scoring last time out (29.80) at The Gardens and bringing up his 8th career win. Winner at his latest appearance in the quickest time on the card. Significant danger. 3. CANYA HANDLE IT ran below his best last time finishing eighth (29.92) over 520m at this track in a NG. Has a good record here including three wins. Cannot be left out. 2. EUREKA MAC hit the frame latest (29.62) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Has three wins already from this draw.","runners":[1,8,3,2],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"1. MAGIC LINKIN jumps from the inside draw. Last start finished 3rd on April 14 over 400m at Bulli behind Kooringa Express beaten 2.75 lengths (22.72) in a Grade 4/5. Looks suited and should go close. 3. FANCY BELLA has been without a win for a while, the latest jumping from an outside draw when fourth (22.90) at Bulli in a Grade 4/5. Has a good record at this journey. Better than last start and can bounce back. 7. MAGICAL ANG boasts a strong record this journey with seven wins and eight minors from 20 tries. Was out of placings last time (30.02) at this track in a NG, finishing fourth and beaten 4.5 lengths. Looks well placed here and among the chances. 2. PRIM AND PRETTY is in the mix despite missing out at this track last time.","runners":[1,3,7,2],"exclusive":false}

data.raceName: MNC TAREE TO WENTWORTH PARK FINAL
data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. SIMPLICITY MAGIC produced an impressive win last time in quickest of the meeting when scoring by 3.5 lengths (30.28) at Taree Super Track. Expected to be in this for a long way. 2. FABRICATOR lit up the clock in 30.28 when winning a Grade 5 over 525m at Taree Super Track last start. Should be in this for a long way. 3. LAST SHOT RIPPER turned in a better run last time to find a minor placing (30.80) at Taree Super Track behind Fabricator in a Grade 5. Has the pace to be prominent. Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings three times from five starts. Can feature again. 7. KIARNI BAD GIRL is worth consideration after filling a hole last start.","runners":[1,2,3,7],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"1. REGGAE ETHICS is a capable type and proved too classy last time to win by 5 lengths at Goulburn in a handy 19.96 beating Major Ted. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in his latest win. Can measure up again. 2. RUGGED ETHICS was always prominent from this same draw last time and drew clear to score (29.92) in a Grade 5 over 520m at this track. Rates a leading chance again. 3. SAMMY ETHAN failed to come into contention last start after settling well back at this track, but prior to that won by a neck at this track (29.76) beating Zipping Hopkins in a Mix 1/2/3 on April 4. Form from his last run is proving to be solid. Great chance to atone. 8. BLACK MYTH WAVE was out of placings last time (30.29) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Has already won five times from this draw.","runners":[1,2,3,8],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"4. ZIPPING VIOLET boasts strong form at this course and distance having won three times from six starts. Recorded a 1.3 lengths win (29.89) in a Grade 5 last time at this track. Looks suited and should go close. 1. VALLEY CASH jumped cleanly and went straight to the lead, holding on for a place when third (30.23) at this track in a Grade 5 over 520m. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Will give a great sight again. 7. HARMONY KEEPING was in the placings last time but three back clocked a sharp 18.23 win over 320m at Richmond. Must include on winning run three back. 2. FASCINATE KATH has ability and can feature with the right run after missing a cheque here most recently.","runners":[4,1,7,2],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"2. RITZA RINGER continued his winning form with another strong run after enjoying a good run to make it back to back wins at this track over 520m (29.65). Hard to fault his recent form and can win again. 7. WYNDRA ALL HEART has found the minor placings here at last couple of runs, finishing third last time beaten 2 lengths (30.03). Must be included in calculations. 1. RIPPER JOE comes here following a placing in fast time (29.79) over 520m at this track. Top win latest and can measure up again. 3. WINSOME STORM has ability and can find the frame.","runners":[2,7,1,3],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"1. LATE IN WINTER is a talented type who pinged the lids and cleared the pack early, leading throughout to a dominant win (29.44) at this track in Grade 5 over 520m. Form at the trip sound including seven wins. Hard to fault his form and makes plenty of appeal again. 2. FOREIGN CAPITAL turned in a fair run last time from the squeeze finishing fourth by 1.5 lengths (29.76). Form here at the trip sound including eight wins. Worth another chance. 7. TAW GALAXY has a strong record this trip with 12 wins and 10 placings from 34 starts. Missed the frame latest (29.75) when fourth over 520m at this track in a NG. Looks one of the chances. 8. RITZA TEARS profiles nicely here at this trip.","runners":[1,2,7,8],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"2. O'KEEFE hit the ground running from an outside draw with a fast early split, holding on for a minor placing when second and beaten 1.5 lengths at this track over 520m in 29.83. Solid formlines coming through his last run. Must come into calculations. 6. PRESIDENT ROLEX goes very well this trip starting 13 times for five wins and five minors. Recorded a one length win (34.45) in a Grade 4/5 last time at The Gardens. Among the main chances. 1. HOT SHOT ETHICS showed good early burn and was there until turning but run over late to finish 6th at Maitland in a Free For All. Has a strong record from this draw. Has a solid record from this box including five wins and a minor placing. Cannot be taken lightly. 3. TENACIOUS TALKER can sneak into the finish with the right run.","runners":[2,6,1,3],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"1. EXQUISITE ETHICS finished second (22.59) two back at Maitland but out of the placings last time when 7th at this track. Worth another chance. 7. CHA CHA ETHICS is a talented type and proved too classy last time to win by 1.5 lengths at Maitland in a handy 22.59 beating Total Texas. Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings two times from three starts. Should be in this for a long way. 8. MYSTICAL ETHICS turned spotting a big start finishing fifth (20.51) last time in a Grade 5 at Goulburn. Form from her last run is proving to be solid. Must be included in calculations. 2. I'M SWEET will give backers a sight.","runners":[1,7,8,2],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"1. FOXY BARBELLA resumed from a break finishing fifth (30.18) at Sandown in a Grade 5. Will strip fitter for the run. Form from her last run is proving strong. Has winning claims on her best figures. 8. BUGLE GIRL comes off an average performance last start when seventh at The Gardens over 515m behind Modest Man (30.41) in a Grade 4/5. Expected to run well. 2. SANDAVE JEANIE is worth forgiving last start after finishing eighth (31.28) from Box 6 at this track over 520m. Boasts two wins from three starts out of this box. Likely to be about the money. 7. CALL SECURITY has definite claims at his first try at this circuit.","runners":[1,8,2,7],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"2. PAW BRUTUS was strong over this course and distance last time despite filling the minors, finishing 4.5 lengths behind Mepunga Envy in 30.60 and recording a new PB here. In form and can measure up again. 1. ASTON MACHINE scored his first victory last start at this track over 525m (30.33). Form should stack up. 8. VICTORY EXAM doesn't have the best strike-rate. Better run when finding the frame last time though, finishing third (30.62) at this track. Leading player again. 5. MEPUNGA RULE has claims fresh from a recent placing.","runners":[2,1,8,5],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"2. MEPUNGA SPIRIT has a terrific record this track and trip with two wins and one placing from three starts. Hit the frame latest (29.66) when second at Sandown in a Grade 6. Has the ability and should feature. 1. RADAR O'REILLY ran below his best last time finishing fourth (30.08) over 515m at Sandown in a Restricted WIN. Got the money at his only try from this box. Has ability and a bold showing is expected. 8. VICTORY ALBERT was out of the placings last time but recorded an impressive Mix 6/7 win (29.73) at Sandown three runs back. This looks easier and expected to improve sharply. 5. JUNEAU PETE has claims fresh from a recent placing.","runners":[2,1,8,5],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"1. PAW TORONTO doesn't show much early dash but winds into his races, two back missing the frame but last time hitting the line hard to place when third (30.47) in a Grade 5 at this track last time. Has a good record here including six wins. Likely to feature again. 7. GIACOMO boasts a strong record this journey with 16 wins and 13 minors from 45 tries. Hit the frame latest (30.04) when third at Geelong in a Special conditions H. Can feature with the right run. 8. HE'S MAGIC is a progressive type who recorded his 25th career win last time out (29.55) at Sandown. Has a strong winning record at this journey. Goes well out of this box with a win and six minor placings. Can make it two on the bounce. 4. NEO DEVERE has been a model of consistency and deserves plenty of thought.","runners":[1,7,8,4],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"4. LOCHINVAR HUMMER comes off a (34.04) win last time, scoring by 5 lengths in a Grade 4/5 over 595m at Sandown. Already a winner from this draw. Rates on top and should go close. 2. NIGEL DEVERE was in the money again last time and not beaten far when third (35.03) at this track in a Grade 4/5. Key player on best and worth another try. 5. PAW IKE had the drop on the lead from the squeeze box but wound up strongly to score (34.98) at this track in Grade 4/5 over 600m. Solid formlines coming through his last run. One of the leading chances again. 7. SHIMA BLUSH is not to be discarded.","runners":[4,2,5,7],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"6. ETHANOL SECRET jumped from a middle draw last time and could manage only fourth and beaten 3.5 lengths (30.22) at Geelong. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Has claims if he runs up to expectations. 3. PAW LOVISA was game in defeat at the latest run, finishing second and beaten 0.8 lengths (30.16) behind Tripped Out at Geelong. Can feature again. 7. PAW ZOLTIN finds it hard to win but looks close to breaking through. Finished third (35.06) at this track last time making it four minors on end. Will give a great sight again. 4. PASS MARK has a solid strike rate at this distance.","runners":[6,3,7,4],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"3. ESPOIR is yet to be beaten at the journey, scoring four wins from as many starts. Comes off a (34.51) win last time, scoring by 2 lengths in a Restricted WIN H over 600m at this track. Appeals as a leading chance in this. 7. EXCLUSIVELY had won four in a row before finishing third (34.87) last time at this track. Solid formlines coming through his last run. Leading player again. 6. ZAP DEVERE continues to race well and appears the next in line.","runners":[3,7,6],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"6. GAMBELLA is worth forgiving for her last effort when seventh (35.32) at this track over 600m. Form here at the trip excellent including five wins. Solid formlines coming through her last run. Has winning claims on her best figures. 2. PAW DAMON impressive display when ran right away after leading to make it back to back wins, scoring at Sandown over 515m (29.43). Leading player again. 3. GENERAL FRANKY is a consistent dog overall, in the frame at seven of 18 starts including seven wins but missed the frame latest when fifth (30.20) over 520m at Geelong. Boasts an unbeaten record from this box. Super consistent and can feature with the right run. 1. GO GO EVIE was unplaced here last start but gets her chance to atone.","runners":[6,2,3,1],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"6. MEPUNGA BREEZE last start finished 3rd over 730m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (43.43) behind Amron Toy in a Grade 4/5 on April 11. Looks suited and should go close. 4. BAFFERT turned spotting a big start finishing fifth (37.87) last time in a Special conditions race at Shepparton. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Cannot be underestimated. 5. IN BLOOM has been mixing form lately, hitting the frame two back before finishing fifth (43.53) at this track in a Grade 4/5. Expected to do much better this time. 1. PAW GRADY can finish much closer after missing a cheque at this track last start.","runners":[6,4,5,1],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"3. CONTRADICTION three runs back produced a blistering 24.80 win over 450m at Ballarat then has found the minor money in two runs since. Hot win three back and looks the one to beat here. 1. NOVA OWEN doesn't have the best strike-rate. Finished in the money last time though when second (30.31) at this track. Has a good record here including two wins. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minor placings. Winning chance. 4. PAW TARKOV boasts a consistent overall record including six wins from 26 starts, the latest hitting the minor money when third (30.39) over 525m at this track. Meets a moderate line up and should run well. 7. MIGHTY MULTI is not to be discarded.","runners":[3,1,4,7],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"1. HOPPY boasts strong form at this distance having won two times from three starts. In the money last time at Warragul (25.96) in a Restricted WIN H, finishing a 1.75 lengths third. Looks well placed and should feature. 8. JETSTREAM ICON scored two back then well held latest finishing a 11 length 8th at this track (30.89). Has a strong record out of this box with six wins and three minor placings from 10 starts. Key runner on best form. 6. SHE'S SAINTLY scored by a long neck last time (29.82) in a Grade 5 over 515m at Sandown. Already a winner from this draw. Makes strong appeal on best. 2. KIWI GEORGE has a solid strike rate from this box.","runners":[1,8,6,2],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"7. PAW NIMBUS has some solid form under his belt and proved too strong last time to win by 4 lengths at Sandown in a handy 29.64 beating Baby Girl Pearl. The form out of the last run is proven to be strong. Sure to prove hard to beat. 1. OFF THE BEER settled down midfield and held his position to the line when finishing 4th (30.02) at Sandown. Yet to win here but has run some good races. Bold showing expected. 5. MAKE THEM CRY was below best last time but the start prior was a Grade 5 winner in the quickest time on the card at Ballarat over 545m in a Grade 5. Expecting significant improvement this line-up. 2. PAW GREGSON can sneak into the finish with the right run.","runners":[7,1,5,2],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"2. DASH INTENTION goes very well at the distance with two wins and a placing from six starts. Recorded a half a length win (29.83) in a Grade 5 last time at Sandown. PAW BENNETT is a last-start placegetter who will have admirers.","runners":[2,8,7,5],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"6. ARCANE scored off the inside draw two back then finished third last start off a wider box (25.46) at Grafton over 450m. Rates highly here and will give a sight again. 1. OUR GIRL STELLA had been racing in honest fashion recording two placings in a row before finishing sixth (31.02) at Q Parklands latest. Will give the top chances plenty to think about. 2. MOCKERY MIRAGE has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing sixth (20.34) in a Grade 6 at Capalaba. Can do much better this time. 3. NOT HALF BAD was well supported last time but could only manage second (29.98), beaten 1.3 lengths. Didn't win last time but still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Overdue and gets his chance.","runners":[6,1,2,3],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"3. SALSA won by 6 lengths last start when getting around Capalaba 366m in a dominant 19.59. In form and can measure up again. 1. CLEAR CODE is a handily bred pup making his debut without a trial. Can measure up. 2. CHEEKY BELGIN missed the placings here last start but is well-placed to bounce back.","runners":[3,1,6,2],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"1. MYSTIC BLOOM filled the minor placings two races on end before breaking through for a maiden win last time, scoring by half a length (25.20) at Grafton. Great chance again. 8. LADY SHAZAM is one of the chances after collecting a minor prize last time.","runners":[1,8,4,2],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"6. RAZOR HAYZE recorded a one length win in a Maiden last time 25.73 at this track and trip and also jumping from the same draw. Can continue winning ways. 7. WIZARD SAID was prominent early from the tricky draw and stalked the lead before levelling up to score (25.24) at this track in a Maiden over 457m. Solid formlines coming through his last run. Will go close again if runs up to latest. 1. Got the money at his only try from this box. Cannot be taken lightly. 2. HELLO ELSA is new to this track but should be in the mix.","runners":[6,7,1,2],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"1. TO XIBALBA was safely held on debut after settling well back when fifth (30.77) at Q Parklands over 520m. Has the inside box this time. Look for sharp improvement here. 7. MOONSHINE MIRAGE has ability and finds the right scenario to bounce back. 8. TERRA BELLA looks much better suited back in this grade and shapes as one of the major players.","runners":[1,7,8],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"2. JANE'S MAGIC is a Robert Cooke-trained newcomer by Out Of Range out of Brockie Magic. Drawn favourably and can capitalise. Strong market watch advised but profiles nicely for this. 8. {"comment":"1. SWEETEST SMILE produced a modest effort most recently when seventh at Casino over 411m behind Tricky Micky (24.03) in a Grade 4/5. Was a winner prior to that. OXIDISATION was a (21.72) winner last time out at this track from Box 8. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card in scoring last start. One of the key runners again. 3. {"comment":"1. SHOUT OUT SHAZAM boasts a strong record this journey with 12 wins and three minors from 19 tries. {"comment":"2. NANGAR NUGGET is looking to continue his winning ways off a handy 21.72 success in a Grade 5 at this track. Smart win latest and looks a key chance again here. 1. {"comment":"8. GOLDEN PHARAOH was out of in the placings when fourth last time but prior to that clocked a speedy 21.80 win over 390m at this track. Can measure up on top win two back. 3. {"comment":"2. LADY OF LUXURY collided with another runner and finished a well held 18 lengths sixth (31.16) last time in a Maiden at this track over 520m. Should be in this for a long way. 7. {"comment":"3. RIO IZZY posted a handy 16.10 winning over 275m at this track last start in a Novice race. Hard to top on the time from last start. 7. {"comment":"3. CORNHILL SCOUT is overdue for a maiden success having placed at four of 14 starts and finishing in the money again at Shepparton. BLAME MARGARET will be hard to beat despite making her debut at this circuit.","runners":[3,1,8],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"6. BILLIES RAINBOW has shown good improvement at her last two starts, hitting the frame latest when 2nd at this track over 425m. Likely to feature again. 4. EXCITABLE DASH can sneak into the finish.","runners":[6,4,2,7],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"5. WIZZIN' BY was well supported last start but didn't deliver when fourth (22.63), beaten 2 lengths. Was in the money the start prior. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. MAISEY MARY can finish much closer after missing a cheque at this track last start.","runners":[5,2,1,6],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"4. BRONELLY TIMMY was a last start winner (24.26) at this track in a T3 RSTW and will jump from box 4 for the first time. All two career wins have been here at this trip. WHERE'S HUNTLY is a capable type and proved too classy last time to win by 1.2 lengths at Warrnambool in a handy 22.57 beating Black Hawk. Still to record a win from this draw but has never missed the frame in three starts. Will go close again if runs up to latest. 6. BLUE TROMBONE has top-three claims while fresh from a six-and-a-half weeks break.","runners":[4,8,6,7],"exclusive":false}

{"comment":"8. MY IRISH continued his winning form with another strong run after leading them home recording back to back wins at this track over 431m (25.19). The one to beat again. 1. data.raceComments: {"comment":"1.
